description: Composition White churidar made of cotton fabric, has waistband with drawstrings and tapered legs Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak This churidar from fabindia is crafted from a cotton-tussar blended fabric, designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect fit. Team it with long or short kurtas and ballerina flats or heeled sandals, depending on your mood, dangle a pair of chunky earrings and you're all set to seize the day with a fab traditional look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26”
